---

## Checklist

- [ ] `skill.yaml` is present and valid (all required fields filled)
- [ ] `README.md` is present and documents usage + examples
- [ ] Prompt is in a versioned folder (e.g., `v1/prompt.md` or `v2-beta/prompt.md`)
- [ ] `skill.yaml` `changelog` section is updated
- [ ] Version follows semver (`MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH`)
- [ ] Status is set correctly (`beta` for new versions, `stable` for tested releases)
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or PII included

### For beta / new versions

- [ ] Prompt has been tested with at least 3 different inputs
- [ ] Beta warning notice included if status is `beta`
- [ ] Feedback mechanism linked (GitHub issue or discussion)

### For stable promotions

- [ ] Beta feedback incorporated
- [ ] Changelog updated to reflect `stable` status
- [ ] Previous version archived if superseded
